Title: xCatalog - Search Products Query
Preconditions: GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql; products in catalog
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" keyword: "laptop") { totalCount items { id name code imgSrc } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response from response panel
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] data.products object present in response
[DATA] totalCount > 0 for valid keyword
[DATA] items[] non-empty; each item contains id, name, code
[DATA] imgSrc is a valid URL or null
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute same query → same results returned
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; totalCount = 0 for known keyword; missing id/name/code on items; GraphiQL shows error banner

Title: xCatalog - Get Product Detail Query
Preconditions: Product ID known from GQL-001; GraphiQL UI loaded
Test_Data: storeId={{STORE_ID}}; productId from GQL-001 result; currencyCode="USD"
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { product(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" id: "<PRODUCT_ID>") { id name descriptions { content } prices { list { amount } sale { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response from response panel
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] product object returned with correct id
[DATA] descriptions[] non-empty; content populated
[MATH] prices.list.amount > 0
[DATA] prices.sale present (may be null if no sale active)
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute query → same product returned
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; product null; descriptions empty; prices missing list amount

Title: xCatalog - Product Facets/Filters Query
Preconditions: Products with properties configured; GraphiQL UI loaded
Test_Data: storeId={{STORE_ID}}; facetQuery includes brand/price range; filter combinations
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" facetQuery: "brand") { totalCount items { id name } facets { name type values { label count } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — note facet values
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type filtered query with term facet applied
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — compare filtered vs unfiltered results
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] facets[] non-empty; at minimum brand and price range facets present
[DATA] Each facet value has label and count > 0
[DATA] Filtered result set is smaller than unfiltered set
[DATA] Combining two filters uses AND logic (result set narrows further)
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Filter counts match product count in filtered response
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; facets[] empty when facet-enabled properties exist; filter does not narrow results; facet count mismatches

Title: xCart - Create Cart Mutation
Preconditions: User authenticated with valid token; store configured; GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
Test_Data: storeId={{STORE_ID}}; userId from auth token; currencyCode="USD"; cultureName="en-US"; user_email={{USER_EMAIL}}; user_password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password for {{USER_EMAIL}} → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click Headers tab → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace) → type: {"Authorization": "Bearer {{TOKEN}}"}
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { createCart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { id } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — save cart id
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] field present in response (BL-GQL-001)
[ERRORS] errors[] is empty (mutation succeeded)
[DATA] data.createCart.id is non-empty string
[DATA] Cart id matches UUID format
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query by id → execute → cart returned
[ADMIN] Cart appears in Admin order management
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; data.createCart null; cart id empty; subsequent cart query returns null; GraphiQL shows auth error (missing/invalid token)

Title: xCart - Add Item to Cart Mutation
Preconditions: Cart created from GQL-005; product ID known; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { addItem(cartId: "<CART_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 2) { id itemsCount items { id productId quantity listPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify item added
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] itemsCount = 1 (or incremented by 1 if cart had items)
[DATA] items[] contains entry with productId = {{TEST_SKU}}
[DATA] items[0].quantity = 2
[MATH] items[0].listPrice.amount > 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → item present
[ADMIN] Line item visible in Admin cart view
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; itemsCount not incremented; quantity wrong; listPrice.amount = 0 or null; productId mismatch
Cleanup: remove item from cart via removeCartItem mutation in GraphiQL

Title: xCart - Update Cart Item Quantity
Preconditions: Cart with items from GQL-006; lineItemId known; auth header set in GraphiQL
Test_Data: cartId from GQL-005; lineItemId from GQL-006; newQuantity=5
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { changeCartItemQuantity(cartId: "<CART_ID>" lineItemId: "<LINE_ITEM_ID>" quantity: 5) { id items { id quantity } totals { subTotal { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify quantity and totals
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] items[0].quantity = 5
[MATH] totals.subTotal.amount = items[0].listPrice.amount × 5 (within rounding tolerance)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → quantity = 5
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; quantity still 2; subtotal not recalculated; GraphiQL shows auth error

[READ] Read response — verify item removed

[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner

[DATA] Removed item id no longer in items[]

[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner

Title: GraphQL Error Handling - Invalid Query
Preconditions: GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql; no auth required for this test
Test_Data: malformedQuery="{ products { INVALID_FIELD } }"; missingArgsQuery="mutation { createCart }"; nonExistentField="{ nonExistentTopLevelField }"
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type malformed query: { products { INVALID_FIELD } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify structured GraphQL error returned (not crash)
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query for non-existent field: { nonExistentTopLevelField }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify field-level error message
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation with missing required args: mutation { createCart }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify argument validation error
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows error data (red text or errors block — not blank/crash)
[ERRORS] Malformed syntax: errors[] non-empty with message describing syntax error
[ERRORS] Unknown field: errors[].message references the unknown field by name
[ERRORS] Missing args: errors[].message references missing argument name
[DATA] All error responses follow GraphQL error format: { errors: [{ message, locations, path }] }
[DATA] No stack traces or internal paths in error messages
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No unhandled server exceptions in GraphiQL console
[RESPONSE] GraphiQL remains functional after each error (not frozen/crashed)
Failure_Signals: GraphiQL crashes or freezes; stack trace in errors[].message; no errors[] on obviously invalid query; blank response panel

Title: GraphQL Authentication - Unauthenticated Access
Preconditions: GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql; products exist; auth tokens available
Test_Data: publicQuery (no token); protectedQuery (orders, no token); mutationNoToken (createCart without auth); validToken={{USER_TOKEN}}
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click Headers tab → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace) → leave empty (no auth)
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type public query: query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}") { totalCount items { id name } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify public query succeeds without auth
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type protected query: query { orders { totalCount } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify authentication error returned
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { createCart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD") { id } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify authentication error returned
[ACT] Click Headers tab → clear → type: {"Authorization": "Bearer {{USER_TOKEN}}"}
[ACT] Click query editor → clear → type orders query again
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify authenticated query succeeds
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Public products query: data.products returned; no errors[]
[ERRORS] Orders query without auth: errors[] non-empty with UNAUTHORIZED message (BL-GQL-004)
[ERRORS] createCart without auth: errors[] non-empty with UNAUTHORIZED message
[DATA] Error messages contain no user IDs, internal paths, or password hints
[DATA] errors[].extensions.code = "UNAUTHORIZED" or equivalent
[DATA] Authenticated orders query succeeds after setting token
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No server errors in GraphiQL
[RESPONSE] GraphiQL remains functional throughout auth/no-auth switching
Failure_Signals: data returned for orders/mutations without auth; GraphiQL shows error banner on public query; error message exposes internal details; authenticated query fails with valid token

Title: xCart - Full Checkout Flow via GraphQL
Preconditions: User authenticated; products available with known SKU; payment and shipping configured; GraphiQL UI loaded with auth header set
Steps:

[ACT] Type createCart mutation → Execute → Read response → save cartId

[ACT] Clear editor → type addOrUpdateCartShipment with address → Execute → Read response → verify address saved
[ACT] Clear editor → type availableShippingMethods query → Execute → Read response → verify methods non-empty
[ACT] Clear editor → type addOrUpdateCartShipment with shipping method → Execute → Read response
[ACT] Clear editor → type addOrUpdateCartPayment with payment method → Execute → Read response
[ACT] Clear editor → type validateCart mutation (if available) → Execute
[ACT] Clear editor → type createOrderFromCart mutation → Execute → Read response → save orderId
[WAIT] Measure total elapsed time across all mutations
Assertions:
[ERRORS] Each mutation: errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)

Title: GraphQL Query Performance

Title: GraphQL Introspection Security
Preconditions: GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql; no auth required for introspection test
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: { __schema { types { name } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — check introspection enabled/disabled status
[ACT] If enabled: scan type names in response for sensitive internal types
[ACT] Re-execute introspection query 10 times rapidly (Ctrl+Enter) to test rate limiting
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data or structured error (not crash)
[DATA] If introspection disabled: errors[] contains message indicating introspection not allowed (acceptable for production)
[DATA] If introspection enabled: __schema.types returned; no types with names containing "internal" "debug" "admin" "secret"
[DATA] Rate limiting applies (10 rapid queries; responses throttled after threshold)
[DATA] Response is valid JSON in either case
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No server errors in GraphiQL
[RESPONSE] GraphiQL Docs sidebar (📖) reflects schema availability
Failure_Signals: GraphiQL crashes on introspection; internal type names exposed in schema; no rate limiting on repeated introspection; server errors in console

Title: xCart - Cart Uses Live Price After Admin Price Change (Not Cached Index)
Preconditions: Authenticated user; product with known price; Admin API accessible; GraphiQL UI loaded with auth header set
Test_Data: productId={{TEST_SKU}}; priceListId from Admin; originalPrice (recorded); newPrice (different from original)
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type products query for {{TEST_SKU}} → Execute → Read response → record as originalPrice
[ACT] Change {{TEST_SKU}} price via: PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/pricing/pricelists/<priceListId>/prices with newPrice
[WAIT] Wait 2 seconds
[ACT] Clear editor → type createCart mutation → Execute → save cartId
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem mutation for {{TEST_SKU}} → Execute
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" cartId: "<CART_ID>") { items { productId listPrice { amount } placedPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — compare placedPrice against newPrice
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty on createCart and addItem (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] cart items[0].placedPrice.amount = newPrice (not originalPrice)
[DATA] cart items[0].listPrice.amount = newPrice
[DATA] No mixed pricing: all monetary fields on line item use newPrice
[DATA] BL-GQL-003: Cart resolves live price, not stale index
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query again → execute → same prices
[ADMIN] Admin pricing UI reflects new price
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL

Title: xOrder - createOrderFromCart Idempotency (Duplicate Call Returns Same Order)

[GQL] Click Execute (▶) again (same mutation, second call)
[READ] Read response — verify second response

[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter

Title: xProfile - createOrganization Mutation Validates Org Name (InputValidationOptions)
Preconditions: GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql; user authenticated
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password for {{USER_EMAIL}} → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click Headers tab → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace) → type: {"Authorization": "Bearer {{TOKEN}}"}
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { createOrganization(command: { name: "AT&T Corp. #1" storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" }) { id name } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify valid business name accepted
[ACT] Clear editor → type mutation with XSS payload: mutation { createOrganization(command: { name: "<script>alert(1)</script>Org" storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" }) { id name } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify XSS name rejected
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] empty for valid business name (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] OrganizationNameValidationPattern ^[\p{L}\p{M}\p{N}\s'\-\.&#/,()]+$ permits &, #, digits
[DATA] Organization created with exact business name including &
[ERRORS] errors[] non-empty for XSS payload — validation rejects <, > characters
[DATA] No organization created with script tags in name
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type organization query → execute → valid org exists; XSS org does not
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: Valid business name with & rejected (false positive); XSS payload accepted as org name in response panel; no validation error in errors[]; org created with <script> in name
Cleanup: delete valid test org via admin API
